name: drizzle-mysql
description: Drizzle ORM over mysql2, with drizzle-kit migrations
readme:
## Drizzle

`db` from `src/db/index.ts`. Tables go in `src/db/schema/`, one file per table, exported from `schema/index.ts`.

```sh
bun run db:generate   # migration from schema changes
bun run db:migrate    # apply
```

Drizzle has no Bun-native MySQL driver yet, so this uses mysql2. The native `sql` client stays available for raw queries.
